overall.description: A cinematic game engine exploration of a cozy medieval attic bedroom with wooden beams and thatched roof, transitioning to a view from a bed looking through red curtains into a stone-walled dining chamber with a large circular window.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy attic bedroom with thatched roof and exposed wooden beams

agents.ego_description: slowly panning across the attic room, observing the bed, spinning wheel, and desk area

entered.detail: large wooden spinning wheel with metal components
wooden frame bed with green bedding and white pillow
circular window with four panes on the far wall
dark wooden storage chest with metal straps
wall-mounted shelves filled with books along the right wall
large circular woven rug covering the wooden floor
wooden writing desk with drawers and candles
metal lantern hanging from the ceiling beam

segments.scene_description: A slow pan across a medieval attic bedroom reveals a spinning wheel in the foreground, a wooden bed with green bedding centered under a round window, and a writing desk with candles on the right. The room features exposed wooden beams, a thatched ceiling, and warm mixed lighting from the window and hanging lantern.

scene_state.functional_zone: bedroom alcove looking into stone dining chamber

events.description: perspective shifts to the bed revealing an adjacent stone-walled dining room through red curtains

agents.ego_description: sitting on or near the bed, looking through the curtains into the dining area

entered.detail: heavy red fabric curtains dividing the bedroom from the dining area
rough-hewn stone block walls in the adjacent room
wooden dining table with chairs in the stone chamber
large circular window with bright light in the dining room wall
small wooden table with bottles and pottery next to the bed

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to the bed, showing the wooden bed frame in the foreground with a view through red curtains into a stone-walled dining chamber. Beyond the curtains, a dining table and chairs sit beneath a large circular window flooding the space with bright light, while a side table with bottles sits nearby.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in a cozy, rustic attic bedroom and transitions into a view of a bright, stone-walled dining chamber. It begins with a slow pan across the attic, gliding past a spinning wheel and a writing desk with candles toward a wooden bed centered under a round window. As the camera moves closer to the bed, the perspective shifts to look through a pair of red curtains that frame the entrance to an adjacent room. The scene then opens into a spacious dining area where a large circular window floods the stone walls with bright light, illuminating a dining table and a side table with bottles.
